1: /// 应用状态管理模块
2: ///
3: /// 管理文件分页、光标位置、显示模式、搜索状态、撤销/做栈。
4: /// 不直接处理渲染或输入事件，由 main.rs 驱动。
5: use std::path::PathBuf;
6: use std::sync::mpsc;
7: use crate::search::{Search, SearchEvent};
8: 
9: /// 显示模式：ASCII 字符 / HEX 十六进制 / UTF-8 解码
10: #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
11: pub enum DisplayMode { Ascii, Hex, Utf8 }
12: 
13: impl DisplayMode {
14:     /// 切换到下一个显示模式（Ascii → Hex → Utf8 → Ascii）
15:     pub fn next(self) -> Self {
16:         match self {
17:             Self::Ascii => Self::Hex,
18:             Self::Hex => Self::Utf8,
19:             Self::Utf8 => Self::Ascii,
20:         }
21:     }
22:     /// 切换到上一个显示模式（Utf8 → Hex → Ascii → Utf8）
23:     pub fn prev(self) -> Self {
24:         match self {
25:             Self::Ascii => Self::Utf8,
26:             Self::Hex => Self::Ascii,
27:             Self::Utf8 => Self::Hex,
28:         }
29:     }
30:     /// 返回模式的显示标签（如 "[ASCII]"、"[HEX]"、"[UTF8]"）
31:     pub fn label(self) -> &'static str {
32:         match self { Self::Ascii => "[ASCII]", Self::Hex => "[HEX]", Self::Utf8 => "[UTF8]" }
33:     }
34: }
35: 
36: /// 输入状态机
37: ///
38: /// Normal: 浏览模式（快捷键导航）
39: /// Edit: 字节编辑模式
40: /// SearchInput / StringSearchInput / GotoInput: 文本输入模式
41: /// SaveConfirm: 退出确认弹窗
42: /// Help: 帮助弹窗
43: #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy, PartialEq, Eq)]
44: pub enum InputMode {
45:     Normal,
46:     Edit,
47:     SearchInput,
48:     GotoInput,
49:     GotoByteInput,
50:     StringSearchInput,
51:     SaveConfirm,
52:     Help,
53:     ModeSelect,
54:     FileBrowser,
55: }
56: 
57: /// 撤销/重做条目：记录单字节修改
58: pub struct UndoEntry {
59:     /// 修改的字节偏移
60:     pub offset: usize,
61:     /// 修改前的值
62:     pub old: u8,
63:     /// 修改后的值
64:     pub new: u8,
65: }
66: 
67: /// 核心应用状态
68: ///
69: /// - file_size / pack_size / total_packs: 文件分页信息（每 pack 4096 字节）
70: /// - current_pack / scroll_top: 当前可见 pack 和滚动偏移
71: /// - cursor_byte / cursor_nibble: 光标位置（字节偏移 + hex 模式的半字节）
72: /// - search / pack_ranges: 搜索状态和当前 pack 内的匹配范围
73: /// - undo_stack / redo_stack: 编辑历史
74: /// - sel_start / sel_end: 选区范围
75: pub struct App {
76:     pub file_size: usize,
77:     pub pack_size: usize,
78:     pub total_packs: usize,
79:     pub current_pack: usize,
80:     pub scroll_top: usize,
81:     pub mode: DisplayMode,
82:     pub input_mode: InputMode,
83:     pub filename: String,
84:     pub cursor_byte: usize,
85:     pub cursor_nibble: usize,
86:     pub dirty: bool,
87:     pub undo_stack: Vec<UndoEntry>,
88:     pub redo_stack: Vec<UndoEntry>,
89:     pub search: Option<Search>,
90:     pub search_active: bool,
91:     pub pack_ranges: Vec<(usize, usize)>,
92:     pub pack_match_idx: Option<usize>,
93:     pub global_match_idx: Option<usize>,
94:     pub input_buf: String,
95:     pub input_prompt: String,
96:     pub save_selected: bool,
97:     pub sel_start: Option<usize>,
98:     pub sel_end: Option<usize>,
99:     pub dragging: bool,
100:     pub help_scroll: usize,
101:     pub help_dragging: bool,
102:     pub help_rect: Option<(u16, u16, u16, u16)>, // x, y, w, h
103:     pub cursor_focused: bool,
104:     pub search_rx: Option<mpsc::Receiver<SearchEvent>>,
105:     pub is_color256: bool,
106: }
107: 
108: impl App {
109:     /// 创建新应用实例，pack 大小固定为 4096 字节
110:     pub fn new(file_size: usize, filename: String) -> Self {
111:         let pack_size = 4096;
112:         Self {
113:             file_size,
114:             pack_size,
115:             total_packs: (file_size + pack_size - 1) / pack_size,
116:             current_pack: 0,
117:             scroll_top: 0,
118:             mode: DisplayMode::Ascii,
119:             input_mode: InputMode::Normal,
120:             filename,
121:             cursor_byte: 0,
122:             cursor_nibble: 0,
123:             dirty: false,
124:             undo_stack: Vec::new(),
125:             redo_stack: Vec::new(),
126:             search: None,
127:             search_active: false,
128:             pack_ranges: Vec::new(),
129:             pack_match_idx: None,
130:             global_match_idx: None,
131:             input_buf: String::new(),
132:             input_prompt: String::new(),
133:             save_selected: false,
134:             sel_start: None,
135:             sel_end: None,
136:             dragging: false,
137:             help_scroll: 0,
138:             help_dragging: false,
139:             help_rect: None,
140:             cursor_focused: true,
141:             search_rx: None,
142:             is_color256: false,
143:         }
144:     }
145: 
146:     /// 终端高度可显示的最大行数（减去 1 行顶栏 + 1 行列号头 + 1 行状态栏）
147:     pub fn max_rows(&self, h: u16) -> usize {
148:         (h as usize).saturating_sub(3)
149:     }
150: 
151:     /// 当前 pack 的实际数据长度（最后一 pack 可能不满 4096）
152:     pub fn data_len(&self) -> usize {
153:         self.pack_size.min(self.file_size - self.current_pack * self.pack_size)
154:     }
155: 
156:     /// 当前 pack 的总行数（每行 16 字节）
157:     pub fn total_rows(&self) -> usize {
158:         (self.data_len() + 15) / 16
159:     }
160: 
161:     /// 文件总行数（跨页全局行数）
162:     pub fn global_total_rows(&self) -> usize {
163:         (self.file_size + 15) / 16
164:     }
165: 
166:     /// 当前视口的全局起始行号 = current_pack * 每页行数 + scroll_top
167:     pub fn global_scroll_top(&self) -> usize {
168:         self.current_pack * (self.pack_size / 16) + self.scroll_top
169:     }
170: 
171:     /// 全局行号 → (页号, 页内行号)
172:     ///
173:     /// 用于 build_lines 跨页渲染：给定全局行号，计算它落在哪个 pack 以及 pack 内的行偏移。
174:     pub fn global_to_local(&self, grow: usize) -> (usize, usize) {
175:         let pack_idx = grow / (self.pack_size / 16);
176:         let row_in_pack = grow % (self.pack_size / 16);
177:         (pack_idx.min(self.total_packs.saturating_sub(1)), row_in_pack)
178:     }
179: 
180:     /// 设置全局滚动位置（自动计算 current_pack 和 scroll_top）
181:     pub fn set_global_scroll(&mut self, global_row: usize) {
182:         let rows_per_pack = self.pack_size / 16;
183:         let max_global = self.global_total_rows().saturating_sub(1);
184:         let g = global_row.min(max_global);
185:         self.current_pack = g / rows_per_pack;
186:         self.scroll_top = g % rows_per_pack;
187:     }
188: 
189:     /// 将字节数格式化为人类可读大小（如 "1.5KB"、"2.0MB"）
190:     pub fn format_size(size: usize) -> String {
191:         let mut s = size as f64;
192:         for u in &["B", "KB", "MB", "GB"] {
193:             if s < 1024.0 {
194:                 return if *u == "B" { format!("{}B", s as usize) } else { format!("{:.1}{}", s, u) };
195:             }
196:             s /= 1024.0;
197:         }
198:         format!("{:.1}TB", s)
199:     }
200: 
201:     /// 获取当前搜索匹配的字节范围
202:     pub fn current_match_range(&self) -> Option<(usize, usize)> {
203:         if !self.search_active { return None; }
204:         let idx = self.global_match_idx?;
205:         self.search.as_ref()?.ranges.get(idx).copied()
206:     }
207: 
208:     /// 清除搜索状态
209:     pub fn clear_search(&mut self) {
210:         self.search_active = false;
211:         self.search = None;
212:         self.pack_ranges.clear();
213:         self.pack_match_idx = None;
214:         self.global_match_idx = None;
215:     }
216: 
217:     /// 刷新当前 pack 的匹配范围列表和高亮索引
218:     pub fn refresh_pack(&mut self) {
219:         if let Some(ref s) = self.search {
220:             self.pack_ranges = s.pack_matches(self.current_pack);
221:             self.pack_match_idx = self.global_match_idx
222:                 .and_then(|gi| s.ranges.get(gi).map(|&(st, _)| st))
223:                 .and_then(|st| self.pack_ranges.iter().position(|(s, e)| *s <= st && st < *e));
224:         }
225:     }
226: 
227:     /// 跳转到全局搜索的第 idx 个匹配
228:     pub fn jump_global(&mut self, idx: usize) -> bool {
229:         let s = match self.search.as_ref() { Some(s) => s, None => return false };
230:         if idx >= s.ranges.len() { return false; }
231:         let (start, _) = s.ranges[idx];
232:         self.global_match_idx = Some(idx);
233:         self.current_pack = start / self.pack_size;
234:         let row = (start % self.pack_size) / 16;
235:         self.scroll_top = row.saturating_sub(12);
236:         self.refresh_pack();
237:         true
238:     }
239: 
240:     /// 跳转到下一个全局匹配，必要时触发增量搜索
241:     pub fn next_global(&mut self, mmap: &[u8]) -> bool {
242:         let ni = self.global_match_idx.map_or(0, |i| i + 1);
243:         let len = self.search.as_ref().map_or(0, |s| s.ranges.len());
244:         if ni < len { return self.jump_global(ni); }
245:         let last = self.search.as_ref().and_then(|s| s.ranges.last().map(|(_, e)| *e));
246:         if let Some(e) = last {
247:             let s = self.search.as_mut().unwrap();
248:             if s.extend(mmap, e + 1) && ni < s.ranges.len() {
249:                 return self.jump_global(ni);
250:             }
251:         }
252:         false
253:     }
254: 
255:     /// 跳转到上一个全局匹配
256:     pub fn prev_global(&mut self) -> bool {
257:         let cur = match self.global_match_idx { Some(i) => i, None => return false };
258:         if cur == 0 { return false; }
259:         self.jump_global(cur - 1)
260:     }
261: 
262:     /// 跳转到下一个 pack 的第一个匹配
263:     pub fn next_page_match(&mut self) -> bool {
264:         let cur_pack = self.current_pack;
265:         if let Some(s) = self.search.as_ref() {
266:             for idx in 0..s.ranges.len() {
267:                 let (start, _) = s.ranges[idx];
268:                 if start / self.pack_size > cur_pack {
269:                     return self.jump_global(idx);
270:                 }
271:             }
272:         }
273:         false
274:     }
275: 
276:     /// 跳转到上一个 pack 的最后一个匹配
277:     pub fn prev_page_match(&mut self) -> bool {
278:         let cur_pack = self.current_pack;
279:         if let Some(s) = self.search.as_ref() {
280:             for idx in (0..s.ranges.len()).rev() {
281:                 let (start, _) = s.ranges[idx];
282:                 if start / self.pack_size < cur_pack {
283:                     return self.jump_global(idx);
284:                 }
285:             }
286:         }
287:         false
288:     }
289: 
290:     /// 确保光标在可见区域内（跨页）
291:     ///
292:     /// 根据光标全局行号与当前视口全局起始行号比较，
293:     /// 必要时通过 set_global_scroll 调整视口位置。
294:     pub fn ensure_cursor_visible(&mut self, h: u16) {
295:         let rows_per_pack = self.pack_size / 16;
296:         let pk = self.cursor_byte / self.pack_size;
297:         let row_in_pack = (self.cursor_byte % self.pack_size) / 16;
298:         let global_row = pk * rows_per_pack + row_in_pack;
299:         let gscroll = self.global_scroll_top();
300:         let mr = self.max_rows(h);
301:         if global_row < gscroll {
302:             self.set_global_scroll(global_row);
303:         } else if global_row >= gscroll + mr {
304:             self.set_global_scroll(global_row.saturating_sub(mr - 1));
305:         }
306:     }
307: 
308:     /// 修改单字节并记录到撤销栈
309:     pub fn modify(&mut self, mmap: &mut [u8], off: usize, val: u8) {
310:         if off < self.file_size && mmap[off] != val {
311:             self.undo_stack.push(UndoEntry { offset: off, old: mmap[off], new: val });
312:             self.redo_stack.clear();
313:             mmap[off] = val;
314:             self.dirty = true;
315:         }
316:     }
317: 
318:     /// 撤销上一次修改
319:     pub fn undo(&mut self, mmap: &mut [u8]) {
320:         if let Some(e) = self.undo_stack.pop() {
321:             if e.offset < self.file_size {
322:                 mmap[e.offset] = e.old;
323:                 self.redo_stack.push(e);
324:                 self.dirty = !self.undo_stack.is_empty();
325:             }
326:         }
327:     }
328: 
329:     /// 重做上一次撤销
330:     pub fn redo(&mut self, mmap: &mut [u8]) {
331:         if let Some(e) = self.redo_stack.pop() {
332:             if e.offset < self.file_size {
333:                 mmap[e.offset] = e.new;
334:                 self.undo_stack.push(e);
335:                 self.dirty = true;
336:             }
337:         }
338:     }
339: 
340:     /// HEX 模式下编辑半字节（nibble）
341:     ///
342:     /// 输入一个 hex 字符，替换当前 nibble，然后自动前进到下一个 nibble/字节。
343:     pub fn edit_hex(&mut self, mmap: &mut [u8], ch: char) {
344:         let nib = match ch {
345:             '0'..='9' => ch as u8 - b'0',
346:             'a'..='f' => ch as u8 - b'a' + 10,
347:             'A'..='F' => ch as u8 - b'A' + 10,
348:             _ => return,
349:         };
350:         if self.cursor_byte >= self.file_size { return; }
351:         let cur = mmap[self.cursor_byte];
352:         let new = if self.cursor_nibble == 0 { (cur & 0x0f) | (nib << 4) } else { (cur & 0xf0) | nib };
353:         self.modify(mmap, self.cursor_byte, new);
354:         if self.cursor_nibble == 0 { self.cursor_nibble = 1; }
355:         else {
356:             self.cursor_nibble = 0;
357:             self.cursor_byte += 1;
358:             if self.cursor_byte >= self.file_size {
359:                 self.cursor_byte = self.file_size - 1;
360:                 self.cursor_nibble = 1;
361:             }
362:         }
363:     }
364: 
365:     /// ASCII/UTF8 模式下编辑字符
366:     ///
367:     /// 将字符编码为 UTF-8 字节序列，逐字节写入并推进光标。
368:     pub fn edit_char(&mut self, mmap: &mut [u8], ch: char) {
369:         let mut buf = [0u8; 4];
370:         let s = ch.encode_utf8(&mut buf);
371:         for &b in s.as_bytes() {
372:             if self.cursor_byte >= self.file_size { return; }
373:             self.modify(mmap, self.cursor_byte, b);
374:             self.cursor_byte += 1;
375:         }
376:         if self.cursor_byte >= self.file_size { self.cursor_byte = self.file_size - 1; }
377:     }
378: 
379:     /// Accept a pre-built Search, run it, position to first match
380:     pub fn apply_search(&mut self, mut acc: Search, mmap: &[u8], h: u16) -> bool {
381:         let off = self.current_pack * self.pack_size + self.scroll_top * 16;
382:         acc.extend(mmap, off);
383:         self.search_active = true;
384:         self.search = Some(acc);
385:         if !self.search.as_ref().unwrap().ranges.is_empty() {
386:             self.global_match_idx = Some(0);
387:             let (start, _) = self.search.as_ref().unwrap().ranges[0];
388:             self.current_pack = start / self.pack_size;
389:             let row = (start % self.pack_size) / 16;
390:             let mr = self.max_rows(h);
391:             let tr = self.total_rows();
392:             self.scroll_top = row.saturating_sub(mr / 2).min(tr.saturating_sub(mr));
393:         }
394:         self.refresh_pack();
395:         true
396:     }
397: 
398:     /// 启动后台增量搜索线程
399:     pub fn start_bg_search(&mut self, needle: Vec<u8>, data: Vec<u8>) {
400:         let file_size = self.file_size;
401:         let rx = crate::search::start_bg_search(needle, file_size, data);
402:         self.search_rx = Some(rx);
403:     }
404: 
405:     /// 消费后台搜索结果，将新匹配追加到 ranges 并更新位图
406:     pub fn drain_search_rx(&mut self) {
407:         let events: Vec<SearchEvent> = {
408:             let rx = match self.search_rx { Some(ref rx) => rx, None => return };
409:             let mut events = Vec::new();
410:             loop {
411:                 match rx.try_recv() {
412:                     Ok(event) => events.push(event),
413:                     Err(_) => break,
414:                 }
415:             }
416:             events
417:         };
418:         for event in events {
419:             match event {
420:                 SearchEvent::Chunk { matches } => {
421:                     if let Some(ref mut s) = self.search {
422:                         for &(start, end) in &matches {
423:                             if s.ranges.last().map_or(true, |(_, e)| *e <= start) {
424:                                 s.ranges.push((start, end));
425:                                 s.match_count += 1;
426:                                 s.mark_all(start, end);
427:                             }
428:                         }
429:                     }
430:                 }
431:                 SearchEvent::Done => {
432:                     self.search_rx = None;
433:                 }
434:             }
435:         }
436:         self.refresh_pack();
437:     }
438: }
439: 
440: /// 文件浏览器条目
441: pub struct DirEntry {
442:     pub name: String,
443:     pub is_dir: bool,
444:     pub size: u64,
445: }
446: 
447: /// 文件浏览器状态
448: ///
449: /// 用于无参数启动或 Ctrl+P 打开新文件时的目录浏览。
450: /// 显示当前目录内容，支持上下导航、进入目录、返回上级。
451: pub struct FileBrowser {
452:     pub current_dir: PathBuf,
453:     pub entries: Vec<DirEntry>,
454:     pub cursor: usize,
455:     pub scroll_top: usize,
456:     pub last_click_idx: Option<usize>,
457: }
458: 
459: impl FileBrowser {
460:     /// 创建文件浏览器，从指定目录开始
461:     pub fn new(dir: PathBuf) -> Self {
462:         let mut fb = Self {
463:             current_dir: dir,
464:             entries: Vec::new(),
465:             cursor: 0,
466:             scroll_top: 0,
467:             last_click_idx: None,
468:         };
469:         fb.refresh_entries();
470:         fb
471:     }
472: 
473:     /// 刷新目录条目列表
474:     ///
475:     /// 读取当前目录，排序：../ 在最前，然后目录按名称排序，最后文件按名称排序。
476:     pub fn refresh_entries(&mut self) {
477:         self.entries.clear();
478:         self.cursor = 0;
479:         self.scroll_top = 0;
480: 
481:         // 添加 ../ （除非在根目录）
482:         if self.current_dir.parent().is_some() {
483:             self.entries.push(DirEntry {
484:                 name: "..".to_string(),
485:                 is_dir: true,
486:                 size: 0,
487:             });
488:         }
489: 
490:         if let Ok(read_dir) = std::fs::read_dir(&self.current_dir) {
491:             let mut dirs = Vec::new();
492:             let mut files = Vec::new();
493:             for entry in read_dir.flatten() {
494:                 let metadata = entry.metadata().ok();
495:                 let name = entry.file_name().to_string_lossy().to_string();
496:                 let is_dir = metadata.as_ref().map_or(false, |m| m.is_dir());
497:                 let size = metadata.as_ref().map_or(0, |m| m.len());
498:                 if is_dir {
499:                     dirs.push(DirEntry { name, is_dir: true, size: 0 });
500:                 } else {
501:                     files.push(DirEntry { name, is_dir: false, size });
502:                 }
503:             }
504:             dirs.sort_by(|a, b| a.name.to_lowercase().cmp(&b.name.to_lowercase()));
505:             files.sort_by(|a, b| a.name.to_lowercase().cmp(&b.name.to_lowercase()));
506:             self.entries.extend(dirs);
507:             self.entries.extend(files);
508:         }
509:     }
510: 
511:     /// 进入指定光标位置的目录或返回文件路径
512:     ///
513:     /// 返回 Some(path) 表示选中了文件，None 表示进入了目录。
514:     pub fn enter(&mut self) -> Option<PathBuf> {
515:         if self.entries.is_empty() {
516:             return None;
517:         }
518:         let entry = &self.entries[self.cursor];
519:         if entry.is_dir {
520:             let new_dir = if entry.name == ".." {
521:                 self.current_dir.parent().unwrap_or(&self.current_dir).to_path_buf()
522:             } else {
523:                 self.current_dir.join(&entry.name)
524:             };
525:             self.current_dir = new_dir;
526:             self.refresh_entries();
527:             None
528:         } else {
529:             Some(self.current_dir.join(&entry.name))
530:         }
531:     }
532: 
533:     /// 光标上移
534:     pub fn move_up(&mut self) {
535:         if self.cursor > 0 {
536:             self.cursor -= 1;
537:         }
538:     }
539: 
540:     /// 光标下移
541:     pub fn move_down(&mut self) {
542:         if self.cursor + 1 < self.entries.len() {
543:             self.cursor += 1;
544:         }
545:     }
546: 
547:     /// 光标翻页
548:     pub fn page_up(&mut self, page_size: usize) {
549:         self.cursor = self.cursor.saturating_sub(page_size);
550:     }
551: 
552:     /// 光标翻页
553:     pub fn page_down(&mut self, page_size: usize) {
554:         self.cursor = (self.cursor + page_size).min(self.entries.len().saturating_sub(1));
555:     }
556: 
557:     /// 确保光标在可见区域内
558:     pub fn ensure_visible(&mut self, max_rows: usize) {
559:         if self.cursor < self.scroll_top {
560:             self.scroll_top = self.cursor;
561:         } else if self.cursor >= self.scroll_top + max_rows {
562:             self.scroll_top = self.cursor - max_rows + 1;
563:         }
564:     }
565: }

(End of file - total 565 lines)
</content>

1: /// 颜色配置模块
2: ///
3: /// 从 YAML 文件（或内嵌默认值）加载字节类型样式。
4: /// 支持 `fg: auto`：根据背景色亮度自动选择黑色或白色前景。
5: /// 提供终端调色板读取，用于将命名色（Red/Blue/...）转换为实际 RGB。
6: use ratatui::style::{Color, Style};
7: use std::collections::HashMap;
8: use std::fs;
9: use std::sync::OnceLock;
10: 
11: type Rgb = [u8; 3];
12: 
13: /// fg: auto 的哨兵值
14: ///
15: /// 解析 YAML 时，`fg: auto` + 有 bg → 存储此哨兵。
16: /// 渲染时由 `resolve_auto_fg()` 根据实际 bg 亮度替换为 Black 或 White。
17: pub const AUTO_FG_SENTINEL: Color = Color::Rgb(1, 1, 1);
18: 
19: /// 计算颜色的感知亮度（ITU-R BT.601 公式）
20: ///
21: /// 返回 0.0-255.0 的灰度值。大于 128.0 视为亮色，前景用黑色；否则用白色。
22: pub fn luminance(c: Color) -> f64 {
23:     let (r, g, b) = color_rgb(c);
24:     0.299 * r as f64 + 0.587 * g as f64 + 0.114 * b as f64
25: }
26: 
27: // ─── terminal palette ────────────────────────────────────────
28: static TERM_PALETTE: OnceLock<HashMap<usize, [u8; 3]>> = OnceLock::new();
29: 
30: /// 从 ~/.termux/colors.properties 读取终端调色板
31: ///
32: /// 解析 color0-color15 的 RGB 值，存入全局 TERM_PALETTE。
33: /// color_rgb() 会优先使用此调色板，使命名色与终端主题一致。
34: pub fn init_terminal_palette(home_dir: &std::path::Path) {
35:     let mut map = HashMap::new();
36:     let path = home_dir.join(".termux/colors.properties");
37:     if let Ok(content) = fs::read_to_string(&path) {
38:         for line in content.lines() {
39:             let line = line.trim();
40:             if let Some((key, val)) = line.split_once('=') {
41:                 let val = val.trim().trim_start_matches('#');
42:                 if let Some(idx) = key.trim().strip_prefix("color")
43:                     .and_then(|s| s.trim().parse::<usize>().ok())
44:                 {
45:                     if let Some(rgb) = parse_hex3(val) {
46:                         map.insert(idx, rgb);
47:                     }
48:                 }
49:             }
50:         }
51:     }
52:     TERM_PALETTE.set(map).ok();
53: }
54: 
55: /// 解析 6 位十六进制颜色字符串（如 "ff00ab"）为 RGB 数组
56: fn parse_hex3(s: &str) -> Option<[u8; 3]> {
57:     if s.len() >= 6 {
58:         Some([
59:             u8::from_str_radix(&s[0..2], 16).ok()?,
60:             u8::from_str_radix(&s[2..4], 16).ok()?,
61:             u8::from_str_radix(&s[4..6], 16).ok()?,
62:         ])
63:     } else { None }
64: }
65: 
66: /// 将 ratatui Color 解析为实际 RGB 值
67: ///
68: /// 优先返回 Rgb 变体的直接值。
69: /// 对命名色（Black/Red/...），优先查终端调色板，无则用 XTerm 默认值。
70: pub fn color_rgb(c: Color) -> (u8, u8, u8) {
71:     if let Color::Rgb(r, g, b) = c { return (r, g, b); }
72:     let idx = match c {
73:         Color::Black => 0,
74:         Color::Red => 1,
75:         Color::Green => 2,
76:         Color::Yellow => 3,
77:         Color::Blue => 4,
78:         Color::Magenta => 5,
79:         Color::Cyan => 6,
80:         Color::White => 7,
81:         Color::DarkGray => 8,
82:         _ => return (128, 128, 128),
83:     };
84:     if let Some(pal) = TERM_PALETTE.get() {
85:         if let Some(&[r, g, b]) = pal.get(&idx) { return (r, g, b); }
86:     }
87:     // fallback XTerm-like
88:     match idx {
89:         0 => (0, 0, 0),
90:         1 => (205, 0, 0),
91:         2 => (0, 205, 0),
92:         3 => (205, 205, 0),
93:         4 => (0, 0, 238),
94:         5 => (139, 0, 139),
95:         6 => (0, 205, 205),
96:         7 => (229, 229, 229),
97:         8 => (80, 80, 80),
98:         _ => (128, 128, 128),
99:     }
100: }
101: 
102: // ─── embedded defaults ───────────────────────────────────────
103: const DEFAULT_YAML: &str = r#"
104: null:      { fg: auto, bg: red }
105: control:   { fg: auto, bg: blue }
106: blank:     { fg: auto, bg: cyan }
107: ascii:     { fg: auto }
108: hex:       { fg: auto, bg: green }
109: head2:     { fg: auto, bg: blue }
110: head3:     { fg: auto, bg: magenta }
111: head4:     { fg: auto, bg: red }
112: tail:      { fg: auto, bg: yellow }
113: unknown:   { fg: auto, bg: red }
114: cursor:    { fg: auto, bg: yellow }
115: selection: { fg: auto, bg: green }
116: found:     { fg: auto, bg: yellow }
117: focused_button: { fg: auto, bg: white }
118: 
119: dim:
120:   global: 0.8
121: "#;
122: 
123: // ─── 极简 YAML 解析器 ──────────────────────────────────────
124: /// 从 YAML 文本块中查找指定 key 的样式定义（如 `{ fg: auto, bg: red }`）
125: fn yaml_parse_style(block: &str, key: &str) -> Option<Style> {
126:     let mut start = 0;
127:     loop {
128:         let pos = block[start..].find(key)?;
129:         let key_start = start + pos;
130:         let rest = &block[key_start..];
131:         // Must be at line start (after optional whitespace)
132:         if key_start > 0 && !block[..key_start].ends_with('\n') {
133:             start = key_start + key.len();
134:             continue;
135:         }
136:         // skip key + ":"
137:         let after = rest.trim_start_matches(key).trim_start().strip_prefix(':')?;
138:         let val = after.trim_start();
139:         return parse_style_val(val);
140:     }
141: }
142: 
143: /// 解析花括号内的样式值，如 `fg: auto, bg: red`
144: ///
145: /// 处理 `fg: auto`：有 bg 时存哨兵 AUTO_FG_SENTINEL，无 bg 时 fg 保持 null。
146: fn parse_style_val(val: &str) -> Option<Style> {
147:     let val = val.trim();
148:     if val == "{}" { return Some(Style::default()); }
149:     // find matching closing brace
150:     let brace_start = val.find('{')?;
151:     let mut depth = 0u8;
152:     let mut brace_end = brace_start;
153:     for (i, ch) in val[brace_start..].char_indices() {
154:         match ch {
155:             '{' => depth += 1,
156:             '}' => { depth -= 1; if depth == 0 { brace_end = brace_start + i; break; } }
157:             _ => {}
158:         }
159:     }
160:     let inner = val[brace_start + 1..brace_end].trim();
161:     let mut s = Style::default();
162:     let mut fg_auto = false;
163:     for part in split_top_level(inner, ',') {
164:         if let Some((k, v)) = part.split_once(':') {
165:             let k = k.trim();
166:             let v = v.trim();
167:             if k == "fg" && v == "auto" {
168:                 fg_auto = true;
169:             } else if let Some(c) = parse_color(v) {
170:                 match k {
171:                     "fg" => s = s.fg(c),
172:                     "bg" => s = s.bg(c),
173:                     _ => {}
174:                 }
175:             }
176:         }
177:     }
178:     if fg_auto {
179:         if s.bg.is_some() {
180:             s = s.fg(AUTO_FG_SENTINEL);
181:         }
182:     }
183:     Some(s)
184: }
185: 
186: /// split on `sep` but skip when inside `[...]`
187: fn split_top_level<'a>(s: &'a str, sep: char) -> Vec<&'a str> {
188:     let mut parts = Vec::new();
189:     let mut depth = 0u8;
190:     let mut last = 0;
191:     for (i, ch) in s.char_indices() {
192:         match ch {
193:             '[' => depth += 1,
194:             ']' => depth = depth.saturating_sub(1),
195:             c if c == sep && depth == 0 => {
196:                 parts.push(s[last..i].trim());
197:                 last = i + 1;
198:             }
199:             _ => {}
200:         }
201:     }
202:     parts.push(s[last..].trim());
203:     parts
204: }
205: 
206: /// 解析颜色字符串：命名色（black/red/...）、auto、或 [r,g,b] 格式
207: fn parse_color(v: &str) -> Option<Color> {
208:     match v {
209:         "black" => Some(Color::Black),
210:         "red" => Some(Color::Red),
211:         "green" => Some(Color::Green),
212:         "yellow" => Some(Color::Yellow),
213:         "blue" => Some(Color::Blue),
214:         "magenta" => Some(Color::Magenta),
215:         "cyan" => Some(Color::Cyan),
216:         "white" => Some(Color::White),
217:         "darkgray" | "dark_gray" => Some(Color::DarkGray),
218:         "auto" => None,
219:         _ => parse_rgb(v),
220:     }
221: }
222: 
223: /// 解析 `[r, g, b]` 格式的 RGB 颜色
224: fn parse_rgb(v: &str) -> Option<Color> {
225:     let inner = v.strip_prefix('[')?.strip_suffix(']')?;
226:     let mut nums = [0u8; 3];
227:     for (i, p) in inner.split(',').enumerate() {
228:         if i >= 3 { return None; }
229:         nums[i] = p.trim().parse().ok()?;
230:     }
231:     Some(Color::Rgb(nums[0], nums[1], nums[2]))
232: }
233: 
234: /// 解析 YAML 中的 dim 配置块
235: ///
236: /// 返回 (全局 dim 系数, 特定 RGB 颜色的 dim 系数覆盖表)。
237: /// dim 系数用于压暗背景色（如 0.8 = 原亮度的 80%）。
238: fn yaml_parse_dim(yaml: &str) -> (f64, HashMap<Rgb, f64>) {
239:     let dim_start = yaml.find("\ndim:").unwrap_or(yaml.len());
240:     let dim_block = &yaml[dim_start..];
241:     let global = dim_block
242:         .lines()
243:         .find(|l| l.trim().starts_with("global:"))
244:         .and_then(|l| l.split(':').nth(1))
245:         .and_then(|s| s.trim().parse().ok())
246:         .unwrap_or(0.8);
247: 
248:     let mut overrides = HashMap::new();
249:     let over_block = dim_block.find("overrides:").map(|i| &dim_block[i..]).unwrap_or("");
250:     for line in over_block.lines().skip(1) {
251:         let line = line.trim();
252:         if let Some((k, v)) = line.split_once(':') {
253:             let k = k.trim().trim_matches('"').trim();
254:             if let Some(v) = v.trim().parse().ok() {
255:                 if let Some(c) = parse_rgb(k) {
256:                     if let Color::Rgb(r, g, b) = c {
257:                         overrides.insert([r, g, b], v);
258:                     }
259:                 }
260:             }
261:         }
262:     }
263: 
264:     (global, overrides)
265: }
266: 
267: // ─── 颜色配置 ──────────────────────────────────────────────
268: /// 全局颜色配置，包含每种字节类型的样式和 dim 参数
269: ///
270: /// 从 color.yaml（或内嵌默认值）解析，通过 `sp()` 函数按编号访问。
271: #[derive(Debug)]
272: pub struct ColorConfig {
273:     pub sp_null: Style,
274:     pub sp_control: Style,
275:     pub sp_blank: Style,
276:     pub sp_ascii: Style,
277:     pub sp_hex: Style,
278:     pub sp_head2: Style,
279:     pub sp_head3: Style,
280:     pub sp_head4: Style,
281:     pub sp_tail: Style,
282:     pub sp_unknown: Style,
283:     pub sp_cursor: Style,
284:     pub sp_found: Style,
285:     pub sp_selection: Style,
286:     pub sp_focused_button: Style,
287:     dim_global: f64,
288:     dim_overrides: HashMap<Rgb, f64>,
289: }
290: 
291: impl ColorConfig {
292:     /// 从文件加载颜色配置，文件不存在则使用内嵌默认值
293:     pub fn load(path: &std::path::Path) -> Result<Self, String> {
294:         let yaml = if path.exists() {
295:             fs::read_to_string(path).map_err(|e| format!("read color.yaml: {e}"))?
296:         } else {
297:             DEFAULT_YAML.to_string()
298:         };
299:         Self::parse(&yaml)
300:     }
301: 
302:     /// 解析 YAML 文本，构建 ColorConfig
303:     fn parse(yaml: &str) -> Result<Self, String> {
304:         let d = Style::default().fg(Color::Rgb(220, 220, 220));
305: 
306:         let (dim_global, dim_overrides) = yaml_parse_dim(yaml);
307: 
308:         Ok(ColorConfig {
309:             sp_null:    yaml_parse_style(yaml, "null").unwrap_or(d),
310:             sp_control: yaml_parse_style(yaml, "control").unwrap_or(d),
311:             sp_blank:   yaml_parse_style(yaml, "blank").unwrap_or(d),
312:             sp_ascii:   yaml_parse_style(yaml, "ascii").unwrap_or(d),
313:             sp_hex:     yaml_parse_style(yaml, "hex").unwrap_or(d),
314:             sp_head2:   yaml_parse_style(yaml, "head2").unwrap_or_default(),
315:             sp_head3:   yaml_parse_style(yaml, "head3").unwrap_or_default(),
316:             sp_head4:   yaml_parse_style(yaml, "head4").unwrap_or_default(),
317:             sp_tail:    yaml_parse_style(yaml, "tail").unwrap_or_default(),
318:             sp_unknown: yaml_parse_style(yaml, "unknown").unwrap_or_default(),
319:             sp_cursor: yaml_parse_style(yaml, "cursor").unwrap_or_default(),
320:             sp_found: yaml_parse_style(yaml, "found").unwrap_or_default(),
321:             sp_selection: yaml_parse_style(yaml, "selection").unwrap_or_default(),
322:             sp_focused_button: yaml_parse_style(yaml, "focused_button").unwrap_or_default(),
323:             dim_global,
324:             dim_overrides,
325:         })
326:     }
327: 
328:     /// 按比例压暗样式背景色
329:     ///
330:     /// 使用 dim_global 系数，特定 RGB 颜色可用 overrides 覆盖。
331:     /// 用于交替 dim 效果，增强相邻相同类型字节的可区分性。
332:     pub fn dim_bg(&self, s: Style) -> Style {
333:         if let Some(bg) = s.bg {
334:             let mult = match bg {
335:                 Color::Rgb(r, g, b) => self.dim_overrides.get(&[r, g, b]).copied().unwrap_or(self.dim_global),
336:                 _ => self.dim_global,
337:             };
338:             let (num, den) = ((mult * 100.0) as u16, 100);
339:             s.bg(scale_color(bg, num, den))
340:         } else {
341:             s
342:         }
343:     }
344: }
345: 
346: /// 按比例缩放颜色（num/den 为缩放因子，如 80/100 = 80%）
347: fn scale_color(c: Color, num: u16, den: u16) -> Color {
348:     let (r, g, b) = color_rgb(c);
349:     Color::Rgb(
350:         (r as u16 * num / den) as u8,
351:         (g as u16 * num / den) as u8,
352:         (b as u16 * num / den) as u8,
353:     )
354: }

(End of file - total 354 lines)
</content>

1: /// 搜索模块
2: ///
3: /// 支持精确 hex 字节搜索和 nibble 模式匹配（如 `4x`、`[0-3]f`、`z`）。
4: /// 使用三级位图索引（L0=pack, L1=1MB, L2=1GB）加速跳过无匹配区域。
5: /// 后台线程增量搜索，通过 channel 回传结果。
6: use std::sync::mpsc;
7: use std::thread;
8: 
9: /// 搜索跳转步长（1MB），用于 O/P 键 ±1MB 区域跳转
10: pub const FIND_CHUNK: usize = 1024 * 1024;
11: 
12: /// 后台搜索每次扫描的数据块大小（1MB）
13: const CHUNK: usize = 1024 * 1024;
14: 
15: /// 位图索引 L1 层粒度（1MB = 1 个 L1 位）
16: const L1_SIZE: usize = 1024 * 1024;
17: 
18: /// 位图索引 L2 层粒度（1GB = 1 个 L2 位）
19: const L2_SIZE: usize = 1024 * 1024 * 1024;
20: 
21: /// 后台搜索事件：一批匹配结果或搜索完成
22: pub enum SearchEvent {
23:     Chunk { matches: Vec<(usize, usize)> },
24:     Done,
25: }
26: 
27: /// 启动后台搜索线程
28: ///
29: /// 按 CHUNK 分块扫描整个文件，每块找到的匹配通过 channel 发送。
30: /// 返回 receiver 供主线程通过 `drain_search_rx()` 消费。
31: pub fn start_bg_search(
32:     needle_bytes: Vec<u8>,
33:     file_size: usize,
34:     mmap: Vec<u8>,
35: ) -> mpsc::Receiver<SearchEvent> {
36:     let (tx, rx) = mpsc::channel();
37:     thread::spawn(move || {
38:         let nlen = needle_bytes.len();
39:         if nlen == 0 {
40:             let _ = tx.send(SearchEvent::Done);
41:             return;
42:         }
43:         let mut pos = 0;
44:         while pos + nlen <= file_size {
45:             let chunk_end = (pos + CHUNK).min(file_size);
46:             let mut matches = Vec::new();
47:             let mut p = pos;
48:             while p + nlen <= chunk_end {
49:                 if mmap[p..p + nlen] == needle_bytes[..] {
50:                     matches.push((p, p + nlen));
51:                 }
52:                 p += 1;
53:             }
54:             if !matches.is_empty() {
55:                 let _ = tx.send(SearchEvent::Chunk { matches });
56:             }
57:             pos = chunk_end;
58:         }
59:         let _ = tx.send(SearchEvent::Done);
60:     });
61:     rx
62: }
63: 
64: /// 搜索状态
65: ///
66: /// 存储搜索模式（精确/nibble）、匹配结果列表、三级位图索引。
67: /// 支持增量搜索（extend）和跨 pack 查询（pack_matches）。
68: pub struct Search {
69:     needle: Needle,
70:     pack_size: usize,
71:     file_size: usize,
72:     pub ranges: Vec<(usize, usize)>,
73:     has_match_l0: Vec<u8>,
74:     has_match_l1: Vec<u8>,
75:     has_match_l2: Vec<u8>,
76:     pub match_count: usize,
77:     scanned: usize,
78:     pub label: String,
79: }
80: 
81: /// 搜索模式：精确字节序列或 nibble 模式
82: enum Needle {
83:     Lit(Vec<u8>),
84:     Pat(Vec<NibAtom>),
85: }
86: 
87: /// Nibble 级匹配原子
88: ///
89: /// 两个 NibAtom 组成一个字节约束：高 4 位 + 低 4 位。
90: /// - Exact(n): 精确匹配 nibble 值 n
91: /// - Range(lo, hi): nibble 值在 [lo, hi] 范围内
92: /// - Any: 任意值（搜索语法中的 `x` 或 `z` 的一半）
93: #[derive(Clone)]
94: pub enum NibAtom {
95:     Exact(u8),
96:     Range(u8, u8),
97:     Any,
98: }
99: 
100: impl Search {
101:     /// 创建精确 hex 字节搜索
102:     pub fn new_hex(data: Vec<u8>, ps: usize, fs: usize, label: String) -> Self {
103:         let l0 = (fs + ps - 1) / ps;
104:         let l1 = (fs + L1_SIZE - 1) / L1_SIZE;
105:         let l2 = (fs + L2_SIZE - 1) / L2_SIZE;
106:         Self { needle: Needle::Lit(data), pack_size: ps, file_size: fs, ranges: Vec::new(),
107:             has_match_l0: vec![0u8; (l0 + 7) / 8],
108:             has_match_l1: vec![0u8; (l1 + 7) / 8],
109:             has_match_l2: vec![0u8; (l2 + 7) / 8],
110:             match_count: 0, scanned: 0, label }
111:     }
112:     /// 创建 nibble 模式搜索
113:     pub fn new_pat(pat: Vec<NibAtom>, ps: usize, fs: usize, label: String) -> Self {
114:         let l0 = (fs + ps - 1) / ps;
115:         let l1 = (fs + L1_SIZE - 1) / L1_SIZE;
116:         let l2 = (fs + L2_SIZE - 1) / L2_SIZE;
117:         Self { needle: Needle::Pat(pat), pack_size: ps, file_size: fs, ranges: Vec::new(),
118:             has_match_l0: vec![0u8; (l0 + 7) / 8],
119:             has_match_l1: vec![0u8; (l1 + 7) / 8],
120:             has_match_l2: vec![0u8; (l2 + 7) / 8],
121:             match_count: 0, scanned: 0, label }
122:     }
123:     /// 是否还有未扫描的数据
124:     pub fn has_more(&self) -> bool { self.scanned < self.file_size }
125: 
126:     /// 增量搜索：从 scanned 位置继续扫描，至少扫描到 min_off + CHUNK
127:     ///
128:     /// 返回 true 表示找到了新的匹配。
129:     pub fn extend(&mut self, mmap: &[u8], min_off: usize) -> bool {
130:         if min_off < self.scanned { return false; }
131:         let mut start = (self.scanned / CHUNK) * CHUNK;
132:         let mut found = false;
133:         while start < self.file_size && (start < min_off + CHUNK || self.ranges.is_empty()) {
134:             let end = (start + CHUNK).min(self.file_size);
135:             let new_matches: Vec<(usize, usize)> = match &self.needle {
136:                 Needle::Lit(needle) => {
137:                     let nlen = needle.len();
138:                     if nlen == 0 { break; }
139:                     let mut out = Vec::new();
140:                     let mut pos = start;
141:                     loop {
142:                         pos = match mmap[pos..end].windows(nlen).position(|w| w == needle.as_slice()) {
143:                             Some(p) => pos + p, None => break,
144:                         };
145:                         let me = pos + nlen;
146:                         if self.ranges.last().map_or(true, |(_, e)| *e <= pos) {
147:                             out.push((pos, me));
148:                         }
149:                         pos += 1;
150:                     }
151:                     out
152:                 }
153:                 Needle::Pat(atoms) => {
154:                     let nbytes = atoms.len() / 2;
155:                     if nbytes == 0 { break; }
156:                     let mut out = Vec::new();
157:                     let mut pos = start;
158:                     while pos + nbytes <= end {
159:                         if atoms_match(atoms, mmap, pos) {
160:                             let me = pos + nbytes;
161:                             if self.ranges.last().map_or(true, |(_, e)| *e <= pos) {
162:                                 out.push((pos, me));
163:                             }
164:                         }
165:                         pos += 1;
166:                     }
167:                     out
168:                 }
169:             };
170:             for &(s, e) in &new_matches {
171:                 self.ranges.push((s, e));
172:                 self.match_count += 1;
173:                 self.mark_all(s, e);
174:             }
175:             if !self.ranges.is_empty() && !found { found = true; }
176:             self.scanned = end;
177:             start = end;
178:         }
179:         found
180:     }
181:     /// 查找 min 位置之后的第一个匹配，必要时触发增量搜索
182:     pub fn find_after(&mut self, mmap: &[u8], min: usize) -> Option<usize> {
183:         if let Some(i) = self.ranges.iter().position(|(s, _)| *s >= min) { return Some(i); }
184:         self.extend(mmap, min);
185:         self.ranges.iter().position(|(s, _)| *s >= min)
186:     }
187:     /// 获取指定 pack 内的所有匹配范围（裁剪到 pack 边界）
188:     pub fn pack_matches(&self, pi: usize) -> Vec<(usize, usize)> {
189:         let base = pi * self.pack_size;
190:         let end = (base + self.pack_size).min(self.file_size);
191:         let mut ranges = Vec::new();
192:         for &(s, e) in &self.ranges {
193:             if s >= end { break; }
194:             if e > base {
195:                 ranges.push((s.max(base), e.min(end)));
196:             }
197:         }
198:         ranges
199:     }
200:     /// 查找包含指定偏移的匹配索引
201:     pub fn idx_for_offset(&self, off: usize) -> Option<usize> {
202:         self.ranges.iter().position(|(s, e)| *s <= off && off < *e)
203:     }
204: 
205:     /// 在三级位图中标记 [start, end) 范围内有匹配
206:     ///
207:     /// 分别设置 L0（pack 粒度）、L1（1MB 粒度）、L2（1GB 粒度）的位。
208:     pub fn mark_all(&mut self, start: usize, end: usize) {
209:         let ep = (end - 1).max(start);
210:         for p in (start / self.pack_size)..=(ep / self.pack_size) {
211:             self.has_match_l0[p / 8] |= 1 << (p % 8);
212:         }
213:         for p in (start / L1_SIZE)..=(ep / L1_SIZE) {
214:             self.has_match_l1[p / 8] |= 1 << (p % 8);
215:         }
216:         for p in (start / L2_SIZE)..=(ep / L2_SIZE) {
217:             self.has_match_l2[p / 8] |= 1 << (p % 8);
218:         }
219:     }
220: }
221: 
222: /// 检查 data[pos..] 是否匹配 nibble 模式
223: fn atoms_match(atoms: &[NibAtom], data: &[u8], pos: usize) -> bool {
224:     atoms.chunks(2).enumerate().all(|(i, pair)| {
225:         let b = data[pos + i];
226:         let hi_ok = nib_match(&pair[0], b >> 4);
227:         let lo_ok = if pair.len() > 1 { nib_match(&pair[1], b & 0x0f) } else { true };
228:         hi_ok && lo_ok
229:     })
230: }
231: 
232: /// 单个 nibble 匹配检查
233: fn nib_match(a: &NibAtom, val: u8) -> bool {
234:     match a {
235:         NibAtom::Exact(n) => val == *n,
236:         NibAtom::Range(lo, hi) => val >= *lo && val <= *hi,
237:         NibAtom::Any => true,
238:     }
239: }
240: 
241: /// 搜索输入解析结果：精确 hex 或 nibble 模式
242: pub enum SearchKind {
243:     Hex { bytes: Vec<u8>, label: String },
244:     Pat { pat: Vec<NibAtom>, label: String },
245: }
246: 
247: /// 解析用户输入的搜索表达式
248: ///
249: /// 支持格式：纯 hex（如 `4f2a`）、nibble 模式（如 `4x`、`[0-3]f`、`z`）。
250: pub fn parse_input(s: &str) -> Option<SearchKind> {
251:     let t = s.trim();
252:     if t.is_empty() { return None; }
253:     // pure hex
254:     let hex: String = t.chars().filter(|c| !c.is_whitespace()).collect();
255:     if !hex.is_empty() && hex.len() % 2 == 0 && hex.chars().all(|c| c.is_ascii_hexdigit()) {
256:         if let Some(bytes) = decode_hex(&hex) {
257:             return Some(SearchKind::Hex { bytes, label: t.into() });
258:         }
259:     }
260:     // x/z/[] nibble pattern
261:     if let Some(pat) = compile_pat(t) {
262:         return Some(SearchKind::Pat { pat, label: t.into() });
263:     }
264:     None
265: }
266: 
267: /// 解析纯字符串搜索输入，返回 (标签, UTF-8 字节)
268: pub fn parse_str_input(s: &str) -> Option<(String, Vec<u8>)> {
269:     let t = s.trim();
270:     if t.is_empty() { return None; }
271:     Some((format!("\"{}\"", t), t.as_bytes().to_vec()))
272: }
273: 
274: /// 十六进制字符串解码为字节序列
275: fn decode_hex(s: &str) -> Option<Vec<u8>> {
276:     (0..s.len()).step_by(2).map(|i| u8::from_str_radix(&s[i..i+2], 16).ok()).collect()
277: }
278: 
279: /// 单个十六进制字符转 nibble 值
280: fn hv(c: char) -> Option<u8> { c.to_digit(16).map(|v| v as u8) }
281: 
282: /// 将搜索语法字符串分词为 NibAtom 序列
283: ///
284: /// 支持：hex 数字、`x`（任意 nibble）、`z`（任意字节 = 两个 Any）、`[lo-hi]`（范围）。
285: fn tokenize(s: &str) -> Option<Vec<NibAtom>> {
286:     let ch: Vec<char> = s.to_lowercase().chars().collect();
287:     let mut atoms = Vec::new();
288:     let mut i = 0;
289:     while i < ch.len() {
290:         if ch[i].is_ascii_whitespace() { i += 1; continue; }
291:         if ch[i] == 'z' {
292:             atoms.push(NibAtom::Any);
293:             atoms.push(NibAtom::Any);
294:             i += 1;
295:         } else if ch[i] == 'x' {
296:             atoms.push(NibAtom::Any);
297:             i += 1;
298:         } else if ch[i] == '[' {
299:             let start = i + 1;
300:             let end = ch[start..].iter().position(|&c| c == ']')? + start;
301:             let inner: String = ch[start..end].iter().collect();
302:             let (lo_s, hi_s) = inner.split_once('-')?;
303:             let lo = hv(lo_s.trim().chars().next()?)?;
304:             let hi = hv(hi_s.trim().chars().next()?)?;
305:             atoms.push(NibAtom::Range(lo.min(hi), lo.max(hi)));
306:             i = end + 1;
307:         } else if ch[i].is_ascii_hexdigit() {
308:             atoms.push(NibAtom::Exact(hv(ch[i])?));
309:             i += 1;
310:         } else {
311:             return None;
312:         }
313:     }
314:     Some(atoms)
315: }
316: 
317: /// 编译搜索模式：分词后验证 nibble 数量为偶数（每字节 = 2 nibbles）
318: fn compile_pat(s: &str) -> Option<Vec<NibAtom>> {
319:     let atoms = tokenize(s)?;
320:     if atoms.is_empty() { return None; }
321:     if atoms.len() % 2 != 0 { return None; }
322:     Some(atoms)
323: }

1: /// UTF-8 字节分类与解码模块
2: ///
3: /// 提供字节级别分类（ByteClass）、行级 UTF-8 解码（decode_row）和字符显示宽度计算。
4: /// 用于 UTF8 显示模式下将原始字节解码为可读字符。
5: 
6: /// UTF-8 字节类型分类
7: ///
8: /// 根据 UTF-8 编码规则，将单个字节归类为：
9: /// - Ascii: 0x00-0x7F，单字节 ASCII
10: /// - Tail: 0x80-0xBF，多字节序列的后续字节
11: /// - Duo/Trio/Quo: 2/3/4 字节序列的首字节
12: /// - Invalid: 非法首字节（0xC0-0xC1、0xF8+）
13: #[derive(Debug, Clone, Copy)]
14: pub enum ByteClass {
15:     Ascii,
16:     Tail,
17:     Invalid,
18:     Duo,
19:     Trio,
20:     Quo,
21: }
22: 
23: /// 根据 UTF-8 编码规则，将单个字节归类为对应类型
24: pub fn byte_class(b: u8) -> ByteClass {
25:     match b {
26:         0x00..=0x7F => ByteClass::Ascii,
27:         0x80..=0xBF => ByteClass::Tail,
28:         0xC0 | 0xC1 => ByteClass::Invalid,
29:         0xC2..=0xDF => ByteClass::Duo,
30:         0xE0..=0xEF => ByteClass::Trio,
31:         0xF0..=0xF7 => ByteClass::Quo,
32:         _ => ByteClass::Invalid,
33:     }
34: }
35: 
36: /// 解码结果：一个有效字符或一个无效字节位置
37: pub enum Segment {
38:     Char { pos: usize, ch: char, len: usize },
39:     Invalid { pos: usize },
40: }
41: 
42: /// 解码一行内的 UTF-8 字节序列
43: ///
44: /// - `data`: 完整数据切片
45: /// - `offset`: 当前行在 data 中的起始偏移
46: /// - `count`: 本行待解码的字节数（16 减去跨行尾字节）
47: /// - `start_pos`: 跨行遗留的尾字节起始位置（通常为 0）
48: ///
49: /// 返回 Segment 列表，每个 Char 包含字符、位置和字节长度。
50: /// 遇到不完整序列或非法编码时标记为 Invalid 并跳过 1 字节。
51: pub fn decode_row(data: &[u8], offset: usize, count: usize, start_pos: usize) -> Vec<Segment> {
52:     let total = data.len().saturating_sub(offset);
53:     let mut out = Vec::new();
54:     let mut i = start_pos;
55:     while i < count {
56:         let b = data[offset + i];
57:         let seq_len = match b {
58:             0x00..=0x7F => 1,
59:             0xC2..=0xDF => 2,
60:             0xE0..=0xEF => 3,
61:             0xF0..=0xF4 => 4,
62:             _ => {
63:                 out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i });
64:                 i += 1;
65:                 continue;
66:             }
67:         };
68:         if i + seq_len > total {
69:             out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i });
70:             i += 1;
71:             continue;
72:         }
73:         let mut ok = true;
74:         for j in 1..seq_len {
75:             if !(0x80..=0xBF).contains(&data[offset + i + j]) {
76:                 ok = false;
77:                 break;
78:             }
79:         }
80:         if !ok {
81:             out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i });
82:             i += 1;
83:             continue;
84:         }
85:         if seq_len == 2 && b < 0xC2 {
86:             out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i });
87:             i += 1;
88:             continue;
89:         }
90:         if seq_len == 3 {
91:             let c1 = data[offset + i + 1];
92:             if (b == 0xE0 && c1 < 0xA0) || (b == 0xED && c1 > 0x9F) {
93:                 out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i });
94:                 i += 1;
95:                 continue;
96:             }
97:         }
98:         if seq_len == 4 {
99:             let c1 = data[offset + i + 1];
100:             if (b == 0xF0 && c1 < 0x90) || (b == 0xF4 && c1 > 0x8F) {
101:                 out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i });
102:                 i += 1;
103:                 continue;
104:             }
105:         }
106:         match std::str::from_utf8(&data[offset + i..offset + i + seq_len]) {
107:             Ok(s) => {
108:                 let ch = s.chars().next().unwrap();
109:                 out.push(Segment::Char { pos: i, ch, len: seq_len });
110:             }
111:             Err(_) => out.push(Segment::Invalid { pos: i }),
112:         }
113:         i += seq_len;
114:     }
115:     out
116: }
117: 
118: /// 计算字符的终端显示宽度（East Asian Width）
119: ///
120: /// CJK 统一表意文字、假名、全角符号等返回 2，其余返回 1。
121: /// 用于 UTF8 模式下对齐双宽字符的显示。
122: pub fn display_width(ch: char) -> usize {
123:     let cp = ch as u32;
124:     if (0x1100..=0x115F).contains(&cp) || cp == 0x2329 || cp == 0x232A
125:         || (0x2E80..=0x33FF).contains(&cp) || (0x3400..=0x4DBF).contains(&cp)
126:         || (0x4E00..=0x9FFF).contains(&cp) || (0xA000..=0xA4CF).contains(&cp)
127:         || (0xAC00..=0xD7AF).contains(&cp) || (0xF900..=0xFAFF).contains(&cp)
128:         || (0xFE30..=0xFE6F).contains(&cp) || (0xFF00..=0xFF60).contains(&cp)
129:         || (0xFFE0..=0xFFE6).contains(&cp) || (0x1F000..=0x1F9FF).contains(&cp)
130:         || (0x20000..=0x2FA1F).contains(&cp)
131:     { 2 } else { 1 }
132: }

(End of file - total 132 lines)
</content>

2: 
3: ## v0.1.7 (2026-06-15)
4:

7: - Doc comments added to all pub functions and fields

16: 
17: ### Top bar
18: - File size and name displayed in top bar
19: - Click top bar to open file browser
20: 
21: ### Flicker fix
22: - Shared terminal between file browser and hex viewer (no teardown/rebuild)
23: 
24: ### Help
25: - Help text moved to `help.txt` (external, easy to edit)
26: - Help scrollbar draggable (click + drag)
27: 
28: ### File browser
29: - Click again on same item to open (touch-friendly)
30: - Mouse click and scroll wheel support

32: ### Bug fixes
33: - Selection start byte now highlights correctly (sp(18) → sp(15))

37: ## v0.1.5 (2026-06-15)
38: 
39: ### File browser
40: - No-argument startup shows file browser (navigate dirs, select file)
41: - Ctrl+P opens file browser from hex viewer (switch files without restart)
42: 
43: ### Search
44: - Ctrl+F global search (works in all modes including Edit)
45: 
46: ### Scroll
47: - Scroll wheel crosses page boundaries (uses global rows)
48: 
49: ### Bug fixes
50: - Windows: OnceLock color config idempotent on re-entry

52: ---
53: 
54: ## v0.1.4 (2026-06-15)
55: 
56: ### Cross-page seamless scrolling
57: - Scroll past page boundaries without stopping — pages connect seamlessly
58: - Global row numbering for seamless navigation across all packs
59: - Row numbers show within-page offset (0x00-0xff), resetting at each page boundary
60: - Up/Down/j/k, PageUp/PageDown, Home all work cross-page
61: - Mouse click and drag work across page boundaries
62: - O/P (±1MB jump) uses global rows
63: 
64: ### Status bar improvement
65: - Pack display shows last visible page number (not first)
66: 
67: ---
68: 
69: ## v0.1.3 (2026-06-15)
70: 
71: ### UI overhaul — Status bar
72: - Removed top 2 rows (filename+size, pack+mode), replaced with clickable status bar
73: - Status bar layout: `[ASCII]  @00000042  pack 1/a  Ctrl+H:help`
74: - Pack info displayed in hexadecimal format
75: 
76: ### Mode dropdown menu
77: - Click `[ASCII]` to open dropdown: ASCII / HEX / UTF8 / [256] checkbox
78: - Keyboard: 1/2/3 to select mode, 4/n to toggle 256-color
79: - Current mode highlighted in dropdown
80: 
81: ### 256-color gradient label
82: - When 256-color enabled, `[ASCII]` renders with per-character gradient background
83: - 7 characters × 7 colors: blue → indigo → purple → magenta → pink → light pink
84: - White foreground on gradient background
85: 
86: ### Clickable status bar regions
87: - Click `@address` → goto byte address input
88: - Click `pack` → goto pack number input
89: - Click `Ctrl+H:help` → open help window
90: - Jumping sets cursor position and focus
91: 
92: ### Mouse drag selection
93: - Click and drag to select byte range
94: - Selection highlighted with sp(15)/sp(17) styles
95: - Click outside clears selection
96: - Status bar protected from selection bleed (Clear widget)
97: 
98: ### Ctrl+C clipboard copy
99: - Added `arboard` dependency for cross-platform clipboard
100: - Mode-aware copy output:
101:   - ASCII: printable chars as-is, non-printable as `.`
102:   - HEX: space-separated hex bytes (`48 65 6c 6c 6f`)
103:   - UTF8: decoded UTF-8 characters (multi-byte sequences properly decoded)
104: 
105: ### Windows double-click fix
106: - Root cause: crossterm 0.28 on Windows generates both Press and Release events for each keypress; code never checked `key.kind`
107: - Fix: filter `KeyEventKind::Release` events (all platforms)
108: - Additional 40ms throttle for Windows auto-repeat (`#[cfg(target_os = "windows")]`)
109: - Removed old fragile 20ms debounce that only covered scroll keys
110: - No impact on Termux/Linux/macOS (Repeat events not generated on those platforms)
111: 
112: ### Internal
113: - New `InputMode::ModeSelect` and `InputMode::GotoByteInput` variants
114: - New `DisplayMode::prev()` method
115: - New `App.dragging` state field
116: - `max_rows` changed from `saturating_sub(4)` to `saturating_sub(2)`
117: 
118: ---
119: 
120: ## v0.1.2 (2026-06-14)
121: 
122: ### 256-color display mode
123: - New 256-color background display mode via `n` key toggle
124: - Each byte rendered with its terminal palette color as background
125: - Auto foreground: luminance-based black/white text for readability
126: - Applied across ASCII, HEX, and UTF8 display modes
127: 
128: ### CI/CD
129: - Added cross-compilation for Linux and Windows
130: - Added aarch64 (ARM64) build for Termux/Raspberry Pi
131: - Binary trimmed to ~564K with `opt-level = "s"` + LTO + strip
132: 
133: ---
134: 
135: ## v0.1.1 (2026-06-14)
136: 
137: ### Search engine overhaul
138: - Replaced regex-based search with custom nibble pattern matching
139: - New search syntax: exact hex (`4f2a`), nibble wildcards (`4x`), ranges (`[0-3]f`), any byte (`z`)
140: - Three-level bitmap index (L0=pack, L1=1MB, L2=1GB) for fast skip
141: - Background incremental search via channel
142: - Search input: `f` for hex/nibble, `F` for plain string
143: 
144: ### Color configuration
145: - YAML-based color config (`color.yaml`)
146: - `fg: auto` — auto-select black/white foreground based on background luminance
147: - Terminal palette sync from `~/.termux/colors.properties`
148: - Named colors + RGB `[r, g, b]` format
149: - Dim alternating effect for same-type consecutive bytes
150: 
151: ### Display improvements
152: - Gradient column header (blue → green)
153: - UTF-8 mode with cross-row multi-byte sequence handling
154: - Display width calculation for CJK characters (width=2)
155: - Byte classification: null, control, ASCII, hex, head2/3/4, tail
156: 
157: ### Help popup
158: - Interactive help with `?` / `Ctrl+H`
159: - Scrollable help content
160: - Version and author display
161: 
162: ### Navigation
163: - Full keyboard navigation: j/k/h/l, J/K/H/L, PgUp/PgDn, Home
164: - O/P for ±1MB area jump
165: - g/Ctrl+G for goto offset (hex input)
166: - Mouse wheel scroll support
167: 
168: ### Edit mode
169: - `i` to enter edit mode, ESC to exit
170: - Hex nibble editing in HEX mode
171: - Character editing in ASCII/UTF8 mode
172: - Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y redo
173: - Tab inserts `\t`, Enter inserts `\n`
174: 
175: ### Selection
176: - `Alt+J` to set selection start
177: - `Alt+K` to set selection end
178: 
179: ### File operations
180: - `Ctrl+S` to save
181: - `q` / `Ctrl+Q` to quit with save prompt if modified
182: - Memory-mapped file I/O via `memmap2`
183: 
184: ---
185: 
186: ## v0.1.0 (2026-06-13)
187: 
188: ### Initial release — Rust TUI hex viewer
189: - Terminal-based hex viewer/editor written in Rust
190: - Three display modes: ASCII, HEX, UTF-8
191: - Pack-based file browsing (4096 bytes per pack)
192: - Basic navigation: arrow keys, j/k/h/l
193: - Byte editing with cursor
194: - Save to file
195: - Color configuration support
196: - Dependencies: ratatui (TUI), crossterm (terminal), memmap2 (mmap)
197: 
198: ### Original Python version
199: - `read_bin.py` — Python/curses hex viewer (original)
200: - `read_bin_new.py` — Python/curses hex viewer (enhanced)
201: - `read_bin_win.py` — Windows-specific Python version
202: - `read_bin_termux.py` — Termux-specific Python version
203: 
204: ### Original Ruby version
205: - `read_bin.rb` — Ruby hex viewer (original)

(End of file - total 205 lines)
</content>

1379: /// 相同类型连续字节交替 dim 增强可读性。
1380: fn build_lines<'a>(app: &App, data_full: &[u8], area: Rect) -> Vec<Line<'a>> {
1381:     let mut lines: Vec<Line<'a>> = Vec::new();
1382: 
1383:     // gradient header

1389:         let col = if i < leading { Color::White } else { grad_color(i - leading, glen) };
1390:         hspans.push(Span::styled(ch.to_string(), Style::default().fg(col)));
1391:     }
1392:     lines.push(Line::from(hspans));
1393: 
1394:     let global_total = app.global_total_rows();
1395:     let max_rows = app.max_rows(area.height);
1396:     let global_start = app.global_scroll_top();
1397:     let global_end = (global_start + max_rows).min(global_total);
1398:     let mr = app.current_match_range();
1399:     let _rows_per_pack = app.pack_size / 16;
1400: 
1401:     let mut cross_row_tail: usize = 0;
